content.text:
[Tue 2026-04-07 09:17 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status. [Subagent Task]: Fix MAGI Deep Think page to show streaming progress instead of blank wait. Edit ~/magi-v2/frontend/deep-think/index.html Current problem: user clicks "Start Deep Think" → waits 5-10 minutes with no feedback → suddenly results appear. ## What to add: ### Progress indicator during debate After clicking Start, show real-time progress: ``` Phase 1: Initial Analysis ✓ Rafael thinking... done (12s) ◉ Uriel thinking... ○ Zadkiel waiting... Phase 2: Debate ○ Rafael responding... ○ Uriel responding... ○ Zadkiel responding... Phase 3: Synthesis ○ Sarael synthesizing... ``` ### Implementation: The backend POST /api/deep-think is synchronous — it returns only after all phases complete. We can't get real progress from it. Instead, use a TIMER-BASED fake progress that estimates based on agent count × rounds: ```javascript // When Start clicked: const agents = selectedAgents; const rounds = parseInt($('roundsSlider').value); const phases = ['Initial Analysis', 'Debate', 'Synthesis']; const totalSteps = agents.length + (agents.length * (rounds - 2)) + 1; // initial + debate rounds + synthesis // Show progress area with animated steps // Each step takes ~15-20 seconds average // Animate them one by one with timing ``` ### Update the progress area HTML Replace the existing 3 static progress steps with dynamic ones based on actual agents selected. Find the existing progress area: ```html
...
...
...
``` Replace with a dynamic render function that shows each agent's status. ### Add CSS for progress animation - Pulsing dot for "thinking" state - Checkmark for "done" state - Dim for "waiting" state - Timer showing elapsed time per step ### Also fix: Deep Think history click The fallback handler at the top of the file should work. Verify the onclick handler fires correctly. Write the changes directly to the file. Keep all existing functionality working.
Let me start by reading the current file to understand its structure.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.json"><meta name="theme-color" content="#060a14"><meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Deep Think — MAGI</title>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/shared/core.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/shared/components.css">
<style>
/* Layout */
.layout{display:flex;min-height:100vh;position:relative;z-index:1}
.dt-main{flex:1;padding:32px 40px 80px;max-width:960px;margin:0 auto;overflow-y:auto}

/* Header */
.page-header{margin-bottom:32px}
.page-title{font-size:28px;font-weight:800;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#6366f1,#34d399);background-size:200% auto;-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;letter-spacing:-.5px;animation:shimmer 4s linear infinite}
@keyframes shimmer{to{background-position:200% center}}
.page-sub{font-size:13px;color:var(--text-tertiary);margin-top:4px}

/* Input */
.input-area{margin-bottom:24px}
.topic-input{width:100%;padding:16px 20px;border-radius:var(--radius-lg);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:var(--glass);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:14px;font-family:inherit;resize:none;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s;backdrop-filter:blur(12px);min-height:80px}
.topic-input:focus{border-color:var(--color-primary)}
.topic-input::placeholder{color:var(--text-tertiary)}

/* Agent Selection */
.agents-section{margin-bottom:24px}
.agents-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.agents-label button{font-size:10px;color:var(--color-primary);background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;font-weight:600}
.agents-label button:hover{text-decoration:underline}
.agents-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px}
.agent-chip{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:var(--glass);cursor:pointer;transition:all .25s var(--ease-out);user-select:none;min-height:40px}
.agent-chip:hover{border-color:var(--glass-border-hover)}
.agent-chip.selected{border-color:color-mix(in srgb,var(--agent-color) 40%,transparent);background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--agent-color) 6%,transparent)}
.agent-chip .dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}
.agent-chip .agent-emoji{font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0;line-height:1}
.agent-chip .agent-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.agent-chip.selected .agent-name{color:var(--text-primary)}
.agent-chip .agent-role{font-size:9px;color:var(--text-tertiary);display:none}
.agent-chip.selected .agent-role{display:inline}

/* Start Button */
.start-btn{width:100%;padding:14px;border-radius:var(--radius-lg);border:none;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#6366f1);color:#fff;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;font-family:inherit;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s var(--ease-out);letter-spacing:.3px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.start-btn:hover:not(:disabled){transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(245,158,11,.25)}
.start-btn:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed}
.start-btn.running{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ef4444,#f87171);animation:pulse-btn 2s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes pulse-btn{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(239,68,68,.3)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(239,68,68,0)}}

/* Progress */
.progress-area{margin:24px 0;display:none}
.progress-step{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:6px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text-tertiary);transition:all .3s}
.progress-step.active{background:rgba(99,102,241,.06);color:var(--color-primary);font-weight:600}
.progress-step.done{color:var(--color-accent)}
.progress-step .step-icon{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);flex-shrink:0;transition:all .3s}
.progress-step.active .step-icon{background:var(--color-primary-dim);border-color:var(--color-primary);animation:pulseDot 1.5s ease-in-out infinite}
.progress-step.done .step-icon{background:rgba(52,211,153,.1);border-color:var(--color-accent)}
@keyframes pulseDot{0%,100%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.15)}}

/* Results */
.results-area{margin-top:32px;display:none}
.phase-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);margin:24px 0 12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.phase-title .badge{font-size:9px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:999px;background:var(--color-primary-dim);color:var(--color-primary);font-weight:600}

/* Agent Cards */
.agent-card{border-radius:var(--radius-lg);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:var(--glass);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);overflow:hidden;transition:all .3s var(--ease-out);position:relative;margin-bottom:12px;animation:cardIn .3s var(--ease-out)}
@keyframes cardIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(6px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
.agent-card-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:14px 18px 8px}
.agent-card-header .dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 0 8px currentColor}
.agent-card-header .name{font-size:13px;font-weight:700}
.agent-card-header .role{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-tertiary);margin-left:4px}
.agent-card-header .phase-badge{font-size:9px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:999px;margin-left:auto;font-weight:600}
.agent-card-body{padding:0 18px 14px;font-size:12.5px;line-height:1.7;color:var(--text-secondary)}
.agent-card-body p{margin-bottom:8px}
.agent-card-body strong{color:var(--text-primary);font-weight:600}
.agent-card-body ul,.agent-card-body ol{margin:6px 0 8px 18px}

/* Synthesis Card */
.synthesis-card{margin-top:24px;border-radius:var(--radius-lg);border:1px solid rgba(52,211,153,.15);background:rgba(52,211,153,.03);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);padding:24px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.synthesis-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f59e0b,#6366f1,#34d399)}
.synthesis-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px}
.synthesis-header .icon{font-size:20px}
.synthesis-header .label{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--color-accent)}
.synthesis-body{font-size:13px;line-height:1.8;color:var(--text-secondary)}
.synthesis-body strong{color:var(--text-primary)}
.synthesis-body ul,.synthesis-body ol{margin:6px 0 8px 18px}

/* Action buttons */
.action-row{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:16px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.action-btn{padding:10px 20px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:var(--glass);color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;font-family:inherit;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.action-btn:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,.06);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.12);color:var(--color-primary)}
.action-btn:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed}

/* History */
.history-section{margin-top:48px;padding-top:24px;border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border)}
.history-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:16px}
.history-item{padding:14px 16px;border-radius:var(--radius-lg);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:var(--glass);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
.history-item:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,.04);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.1)}
.history-item .icon{font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0}
.history-item .info{flex:1;min-width:0}

content.text: Brace balance is 0 — no syntax issues. Let me also verify the fallback `_loadDT` at the top of the file still exists and the module-level one properly overrides it:

The fallback at line 206 uses `window._loadDT = window._loadDT || function(id) {...}` so it only sets if not already defined. The module script at line 662 uses `window._loadDT = function(id) {...}` which unconditionally sets it — since the module runs after the inline script, the module version properly overrides the fallback. And the fallback is still there as safety net if the module fails to load.

691 /home/openclaw/magi-v2/frontend/deep-think/index.html

The file went from ~500 lines to 691 lines (added ~190 lines of progress system). Here's a summary of what was done:

---

## Completed Changes

### 1. Dynamic Progress System (replacing static 3-step progress)

**CSS additions:**
- `.progress-phase` / `.progress-phase-title` — grouped phases with numbered badges
- `.progress-step.waiting` — dimmed (opacity 0.45) for steps not yet started
- `.progress-step.active` — highlighted with pulsing dot animation (`◉`)
- `.progress-step.done` — green checkmark (`✓`) with accent color
- `.step-timer` — per-step elapsed time counter (monospace, right-aligned)
- `.progress-bar-wrap` — overall progress bar with shimmer gradient animation
- `.progress-elapsed` — global elapsed time display

**HTML:** Replaced the 3 static `<div class="progress-step">` elements with a dynamic container (`#progressSteps`) plus a progress bar and elapsed timer.

**JavaScript — 3 new functions:**

1. **`buildProgressPlan(agents, rounds)`** — Builds a structured plan based on actual selected agents and round count:
   - Phase 1: Initial Analysis (one step per agent, ~15-23s each)
   - Phase 2: Debate (multiple rounds based on slider, one step per agent per round, ~18-28s each)
   - Phase 3: Synthesis (single step for Sarael, ~20-30s)

2. **`renderProgressSteps(phases)`** — Renders the progress UI dynamically from the plan. Each agent gets their emoji, name, and color.

3. **`startProgressAnimation(phases)`** — Timer-based fake progress that:
   - Activates steps one-by-one with randomized timing
   - Shows a pulsing `◉` icon on the active step
   - Displays per-step elapsed seconds (`12s`, `18s`, etc.)
   - Updates the overall progress bar (caps at 95% until done)
   - Returns a `{ finish() }` controller that instantly marks everything done when the API actually returns

### 2. Fixed `startDeepThink()` flow
- Removed old `setStep(1)` / `setStep(3, true)` calls
- Now calls `buildProgressPlan` → `renderProgressSteps` → `startProgressAnimation` 
- Calls `progressCtrl.finish()` both on success and error

### 3. Fixed `_loadDT` history click handler
- Added null-safe access for `$('topicInput')` and `$('progressArea')` 
- Added error handling with `toast()` when item not found
- Added `.catch()` for network errors
- Fallback handler at top of file still works as safety net if module fails
